task_completion.description: Agent accessed the CAMEO Chemicals website to look up chemical properties.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser window is open and displaying the CAMEO Chemicals website (cameochemicals.noaa.gov) with search results or chemical data pages.

task_completion.description: Agent created the report with the correct header and structure.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text file named 'phase_state_report.txt' is visible in an editor, containing the exact header 'PHASE STATE ANALYSIS REPORT' and formatted sections for each chemical.

task_completion.description: Agent correctly recorded Benzene's properties and predicted its phase states.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The report shows Benzene with Melting Point ~5.5 C, Boiling Point ~80.1 C, State at -10C: Solid, and State at 45C: Liquid.

task_completion.description: Agent correctly recorded Ethyl Chloride's properties and predicted its phase states.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The report shows Ethyl Chloride with Melting Point ~-138.7 C (or -138.9 C), Boiling Point ~12.3 C, State at -10C: Liquid, and State at 45C: Gas.

task_completion.description: Agent correctly recorded Phenol's properties and predicted its phase states.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The report shows Phenol with Melting Point ~40.5 C (or up to 42.8 C), Boiling Point ~181.7 C (or 182.2 C), State at -10C: Solid, and State at 45C: Liquid.

task_completion.description: Agent correctly recorded Naphthalene's properties and predicted its phase states.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The report shows Naphthalene with Melting Point ~80.2 C, Boiling Point ~217.9 C (or 218.9 C), State at -10C: Solid, and State at 45C: Solid.

integrity.description: Agent used a web browser to interact with the CAMEO Chemicals database.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser being actively used to search for the chemicals, rather than the agent hallucinating the data or using terminal scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Agent created the report using an interactive text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The report should be seen open in a GUI text editor (like gedit, mousepad) or an interactive terminal editor (like nano, vim), rather than just being generated via a single echo/cat command.

integrity.description: The phase states predicted match the logic of the recorded melting and boiling points.
integrity.visual_evidence: The states in the report must logically follow from the MP and BP values written in the report (Temp < MP = Solid, MP < Temp < BP = Liquid, Temp > BP = Gas).

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Acceptable values and correct states based on CAMEO Chemicals:
1. Benzene: MP ~5.5°C, BP ~80.1°C | -10°C: Solid | 45°C: Liquid
2. Ethyl Chloride: MP ~-138.7°C (or -138.9°C), BP ~12.3°C | -10°C: Liquid | 45°C: Gas
3. Phenol: MP ~40.5°C (or 42.8°C), BP ~181.7°C (or 182.2°C) | -10°C: Solid | 45°C: Liquid
4. Naphthalene: MP ~80.2°C, BP ~217.9°C (or 218.9°C) | -10°C: Solid | 45°C: Solid
Note: Minor variations in MP/BP values (up to 2°C) are acceptable due to rounding or specific source variations within the CAMEO database.
